'''Lennax''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carpurnal system]], coreward of [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]]. It was a hot, arid planet covered in grass plains and near desert. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lennaxian]]s lived in a simple, nomadic society. There were numerous trade settlements on the planet, primarily [[Port Lennax/Legends|Port Lennax]]. A world of no particular influence, removed from major trade routes, it nonetheless attracted spacers of various species.<ref name="Flight of the Jedi" />

{{Planet-stub}}
